sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n82926" key="phla/rion" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πηλάριον</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, name of an <sense id="n82926.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">eye-salve</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0718.tlg007:9" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aët.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.9</biblScope> </bibl> (pl.), <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0744.tlg001:2" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Alex.Trall.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
